title: The Amateur vs. The Pro
author: From: The War of Art
content: The amateur works when they feel like it; the pro works every day regardless of emotional state.
action: Action: Commit to 30 minutes of deep work, regardless of how you feel.

title: Resistance
author: From: The War of Art
content: Resistance is a universal force that keeps you from your highest potential. The more important a project is, the more resistance you will feel.
action: Action: Recognize the next moment of procrastination as 'Resistance' and push through it.

title: Turning Pro
author: From: Turning Pro
content: Turning pro is a mindset shift. It is the moment you decide to stop treating your craft as a hobby and start treating it as your life’s work.
action: Action: Establish one 'professional' ritual for your daily work.

title: Feedback Loops in Mastery
author: From: Mastery
content: Mastery is not about time spent, but about the quality of the feedback loops you create to improve your skill.
action: Action: Create a way to measure your performance on a specific task daily.

title: The Grand Strategy
author: From: The 33 Strategies of War
content: The grand strategy is the ability to see the 'big picture' amidst the chaos of day-to-day operations.
action: Action: Spend 10 minutes viewing your current workload from a 6-month perspective.
